entities.name: ADAPTATION PATHWAYS
entities.description: Approaches for exploring sequences of actions to address challenges in uncertain conditions

entities.name: UNCERTAIN CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental or social circumstances characterized by unpredictability

entities.name: LEARNING FRAMEWORK
entities.description: A tool used to identify guiding propositions for successful adaptation pathways and facilitate reflexive learning

entities.name: TRANSFORMATIVE SCENARIO PLANNING
entities.description: A case study approach used to analyze adaptation pathways in a specific context

entities.name: RURAL MALI
entities.description: The geographic area where the transformative scenario planning case study was conducted

entities.name: LOCAL INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Community-based structures that ground adaptation pathways

entities.name: CROSS-LEVEL INTERACTIONS
entities.description: Interactions between different levels of governance or society necessary for adaptation pathways

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL CHANGES
entities.description: Modifications in organizational or social structures required for adaptation

entities.name: REFLEXIVE LEARNING
entities.description: A process of critical self-reflection and gap identification during pathway development

entities.name: POWER RELATIONS
entities.description: The dynamics of power that influence adaptation plans

entities.name: SOCIAL INEQUALITY
entities.description: Disparities in social status and resources that impact adaptation plans
